file_system_id.description: Identifier of the EFS file system to associate with the access point; must be an existing file system.

posix_user.description: Specifies the POSIX user information for the access point, including user ID, group ID, and secondary group IDs.

root_directory.description: Defines the configuration for the root directory of the EFS access point, specifying ownership, permissions, and path; must adhere to EFS directory structure.
root_directory.type: list(object({path: optional(string),creation_info: list(object({owner_gid: number,owner_uid: number,permissions: string}))}))

tags.description: Key-value pairs for tagging the access point; useful for identifying, categorizing, and managing resources.
